case_title: NORTHERN CALIFORNIA BAKERY DRIVERS SECURITY FUND VS BAY AREA PIE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $318.00 FILED BY NORTHERN CALIFORNIA BAKERY DRIVERS SECURITY FUND AS TO DEFENDANT BAY AREA PIE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BAY AREA PIE COMPANY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA BAKERY DRIVERS SECURITY FUND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAY AREA PIE COMPANY $318.00 PRINCIPAL, $33.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $351.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $5.00 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT BAY AREA PIE COMPANY
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $318.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED AS TO DEFENDANT BAY AREA PIE COMPANY
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BAY AREA PIE COMPANY
W RIT ISSUED TO SF BY MISTAKE SHOULD BE SAN MATEO.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $67.64 AS TO DEFENDANT BAY AREA PIE COMPANY
